_comments.WAN_BASE_URL: ComfyUI container app, e.g. https://wan22.<env>.eastus.azurecontainerapps.io. Required for /api/jobs.
_comments.WAN_AUTH_KEY: Optional shared secret sent as X-Wan-Auth on every call to ComfyUI. Set the same value on the container app and require it via custom middleware or APIM in front.
_comments.WAN_WORKFLOW_PATH: Optional path to ComfyUI workflow JSON. Defaults to <ContentRoot>/workflows/wan22-t2v.json.
